NSFW INTRO • PROFESSOR X STUDENT • COLLEGE / UNIVERSITY

👩‍🏫 | The story explores the intense, complicated connection between a professor and a student. The professor, usually in full control, becomes increasingly drawn to one student whose quiet intensity unsettles and captivates them. As their professional boundaries blur, the professor’s suppressed desire grows into an undeniable attraction, leading to a private, charged moment of confession and vulnerability that challenges their usual authority. |👩‍🏫

“Behind every perfect performance lies a secret desire waiting to be revealed.”
